description: Maps Sentry MCP response fields to shared layer fields. Source paths use dot notation into the schema.json data payload. All values are real crash/error data from Sentry — never estimates.

field_mappings.transform_note: Multiply by 100 to convert 0.0–1.0 fraction to 0–100 percent. System-wide guardrail: must remain > 99.5%.
Total error events in the reported period
Unique users affected by at least one error in the reported period
Replace the existing topIssues array with the freshly pulled top 10 unresolved issues
Filter topIssues where level == 'fatal'. These represent crash-class issues most relevant to CX analysis and review triage.
Total users impacted — used by /cx to contextualize complaint volume relative to error exposure

validation_rules.description: Numeric fields are considered consistent if within 5% of the existing shared layer value. Categorical fields must match exactly. New fields (null → value) are always consistent. Measured data superseding estimated data is always consistent.
